ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the merchant selling the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the item */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Sub-category of the item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Brand of the item */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the item */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchants" (
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchant */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the merchant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the merchant */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the merchant */,
  "bank_account_number" TEXT /* Bank account number of the merchant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the merchant fulfilling the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used by the customer */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount applied to the order */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Shipping cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "item_price" TEXT /* Price of the item at the time of order */,
  "product_variant_id" INTEGER /* Variant of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the item was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used for the shipment */,
  "shipping_service" TEXT /* Shipping service used for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being feedback on */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was processed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used for the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refunds" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being refunded */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date the refund was processed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund */,
  "refund_reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the refund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refunds_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
